truncate.description: Whether to render the status template with used variables only.
truncate.title: Truncate

template.description:
Default server status template.

Including:

- CPU usage
- Memory usage
- Runtime
- Uptime
- Swap usage
- Disk usage
template.title: Template

$disable.description: Expression for whether disable this plugin

$priority.description: Plugin loading priority, lower value means higher priority (default: 16)

$filter.description: Plugin filter expression, which will be evaluated in the context of the plugin
